description_long: This house is a modern, flat-roofed residential building surrounded by dense, mature trees, creating a secluded and private atmosphere. The structure features clean, geometric lines with a predominantly white facade, accented by sections of natural wood and large glass windows. The roof appears to be flat, with some areas possibly used as terraces or patios. The house is set within a lush green landscape, with the trees forming a natural barrier around the property. Multiple entry points and outdoor spaces are visible, suggesting a design that integrates indoor and outdoor living. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on simplicity, openness, and harmony with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed white house with wood accents, large windows, and surrounded by dense green trees, creating a private and contemporary residence.
description_view_0: The house is mostly obscured by trees, but the flat roof and white facade are visible, with the building nestled centrally within the foliage.
description_view_1: This side view shows more of the white exterior walls and a section of the roof, with the trees closely encircling the house.
description_view_2: The rear or opposite side reveals additional flat roof sections and more of the house's geometric layout, still heavily surrounded by trees.
description_view_3: A partial side/front view highlights the main entry area, with visible windows and a break in the tree cover allowing more light onto the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple modern door, minimal steps, and no prominent porch, integrated into the facade with clean lines and surrounded by landscaping.
